name: Stick Dinner
description: Stick Dinner is a man with an Afro hairstyle who comes to survey the country of Kakin with Kite. He is from the same town as Spinner. He likes saying puns and seems to be in charge of the group's rations. According to Kite, Stick Dinner and his fellow amateur Hunters in the Kakin Exploration Team have excellent potential to be pro-hunters. He is seen once again back in his hometown along with the rest of Kite's apprentices, Gon and Kite.
